transformationMoves: Replace abstract summary with active props already in the beat: straps, vellum, wax, tack, stone-light, lane position.
Trade explanatory simile or metaphor for bodily signal, object contact, or route logic specific to Sylvanas's field POV.
Keep confrontational dialogue pinned to the nearest working material: bracer seam, map case edge, dispatch tube, saddle leather, coat pocket.
Let institutional stakes ride through documents, horses, relay gear, and road decisions instead of clean thematic phrasing.
Protect cadence by making local replacements that sharpen pressure without expanding the paragraph.

scenes.title: The Camp
scenes.biggestGap: Sylvanas briefly summarizes the old border job instead of staying with the map case, road, and bodies already present.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Field camp south of Stratholme with the north road latent in the marked page.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Map case strap, crate table, and Jaina's marked roads must keep the inference tactile.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads which job can still be carried on horseback and which one died at the wall.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Finger, strap, and page contact keep the short exchange from floating.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The decision must leave the source physically north on the page, not only in thought.

scenes.title: The Sister
scenes.biggestGap: Several beats still explain the wound instead of letting recall vellum, tack, and body contact do the work.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Working camp with picket line, escort riders, and Stratholme's bruise still visible.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Recall vellum, wax seal, bracer seam, and horse gear carry the family wound physically.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads the tactic through what Vereesa had to carry and how the camp listens.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Hands on the recall, the map case edge, and Cyndia's horse-work keep the exchange embodied.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The refusal leaves the document physically undelivered even as the choice becomes public.

scenes.title: The Parallel Severance
scenes.biggestGap: The stone-call observation needs exact bodily stillness rather than a stock simile.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Birch-edge call site with camp sounds behind and the road home already forming.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Stone-light, cuff seam, coat cloth, and dead crystal keep the moment external.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas gets posture, pulse, and timing only.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Observed light behavior and storage gesture prevent over-translation.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Jaina pockets the dead stone as Vereesa carries the folded recall away.

scenes.title: The Road North
scenes.biggestGap: Final-third tension depends on keeping the ride in lane geometry, relay hardware, and bodily cost after local fixes.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: The coast road must keep changing under them toward harbor country.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Horse gear, ruts, relay dish, salt, and cold air hold the tail on the page.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads file order and Jaina's body as operational facts.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Road talk stays tied to rein work, saddle shock, and the wind.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The chapter ends on coast, failing relays, and borrowed passage, not thematic summary.
